1132 Ash Ave, Las Cruces, NM 88001, USA
Several large blueberry bushes on street side of side walk in front of house. Ask permission from house owner before picking. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: July-August.
832 S Walnut St, Las Cruces, NM 88001, USA
Many trees around park. Some are by the lake, and there are a few others on NW side of the field. Falling Fruit season: November-December.
